warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"50h8","text":"For hazard information and safety warnings, please refer to the SDS (Safety Data Sheet).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Treat H9 AAVS1-TRE3G-NGN2 cells with Accutase and plate the dissociated cells in matrigel-coated 6-well plates (2x10 5 cells/well) in ND1 Medium supplemented with Y27632 ( 10 micromolar (µM) ).
Replace the medium with ND1 Medium .
Replace the medium with ND2 Medium .
Exchange 50% of the medium from each well.
Treat the cells with Accutase and replate the dissociated cells in matrigel-coated 6-well plates (2-4x10 5 cells/well) in ND2 Medium .

Exchange 50% of the medium from each well every other day. * Doxycycline can be withdrawn on Day 10 (or even earlier-not tested yet). * Cells can be split from Day 5 to Day 7 (or even earlier-not tested yet).
creator: Felix Kraus
